'''warate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:multiaxially|multiaxially]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-r-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:multiaxially|multiaxially]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| warate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:warate|warate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:waratesher|waratesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:waratesherĂ«m|waratesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:waratero|waratero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:warateshĂ«|warateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:warateshĂ«m|warateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwaratero|gokiwaratero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwarateshĂ«|gokiwarateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwarateshĂ«m|gokiwarateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowarankerom|gowarankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowarankeshĂ«|gowarankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowarankeshĂ«m|gowarankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowarankeya|gowarankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:waraterom|waraterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:waratemu|waratemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:warateya|warateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwaraterom|gokiwaraterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwaratemu|gokiwaratemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwarateya|gokiwarateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:wararate|wararate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wararatesher|wararatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wararatesherĂ«m|wararatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wararatero|wararatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wararateshĂ«|wararateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wararateshĂ«m|wararateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwararatero|gokiwararatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwararateshĂ«|gokiwararateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwararateshĂ«m|gokiwararateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowararankerom|gowararankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowararankeshĂ«|gowararankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowararankeshĂ«m|gowararankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowararankeya|gowararankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wararaterom|wararaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wararatemu|wararatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wararateya|wararateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwararaterom|gokiwararaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwararatemu|gokiwararatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwararateya|gokiwararateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:wĂŠrĂŠte|wĂŠrĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wĂŠrĂŠtesher|wĂŠrĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠrĂŠtesherĂ«m|wĂŠrĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠrĂŠtero|wĂŠrĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«|wĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m|wĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠrĂŠtero|gokiwĂŠrĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«|gokiwĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiwĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowĂŠrĂŠnkerom|gowĂŠrĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«|gowĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gowĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowĂŠrĂŠnkeya|gowĂŠrĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠrĂŠterom|wĂŠrĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠrĂŠtemu|wĂŠrĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wĂŠrĂŠteya|wĂŠrĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠrĂŠterom|gokiwĂŠrĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠrĂŠtemu|gokiwĂŠrĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠrĂŠteya|gokiwĂŠrĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:wafrafte|wafrafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wafraftesher|wafraftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafraftesherĂ«m|wafraftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafraftero|wafraftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wafrafteshĂ«|wafrafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafrafteshĂ«m|wafrafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafraftero|gokiwafraftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwafrafteshĂ«|gokiwafrafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafrafteshĂ«m|gokiwafrafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowafrafnkerom|gowafrafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowafrafnkeshĂ«|gowafrafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowafrafnkeshĂ«m|gowafrafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowafrafnkeya|gowafrafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafrafterom|wafrafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafraftemu|wafraftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wafrafteya|wafrafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafrafterom|gokiwafrafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafraftemu|gokiwafraftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwafrafteya|gokiwafrafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
